## Test Plan

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=high`
- [ ] `OLCX_E2E_IGNORE_LOCAL_ENV=1 OLCX_E2E_ENABLE_REAL=0 npm run test:e2e:real`
- [ ] `npm run prepublish:check`

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No Overleaf cookies, passwords, private project IDs, or paper contents are included.
- [ ] User-facing behavior is documented.
- [ ] Copied or adapted third-party code keeps required license notices.
